items.headline: Tree work sought for damaged pine branch in Limpsfield
items.summary: A planning application has been made to remove a broken branch from a Corsican pine at Hunters End on Uvedale Road, Limpsfield. The lowest branch has twisted and half snapped, leaving it hanging over the property, and the work would cut it back to the main stem.
